headline: Is Mondelez (MDLZ) Offering Value After Recent Share Price Weakness?
summary: Investors may be wondering if Mondelez International at around US$57.16 is starting to look interesting on value, or if the recent share price weakness is a warning sign that deserves attention. The stock is up 6.5% year to date, but has seen a 1.7% decline over the last week and an 8.7% decline over the last month. These moves contribute to a 9.4% return over the past year and 10.2% over five years. Recent attention on Mondelez has focused on how large branded food groups are pricing their...
